ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., Event, Wiki page, Biblio, Use of Resources, FAQ) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author or lead researcher */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords for easy categorization and search */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Who can view the project (e.g., public, private, internal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the author */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the author (e.g., Professor, Researcher) */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the resource is allocated to */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Personnel, Equipment, Funding) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was allocated */,
  "cost" TEXT /* The cost of the resource */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the resource */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource (e.g., allocated, in use, returned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_resources_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the document is associated with */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the document */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the document file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX, PPTX) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion thread */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the discussion is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the discussion thread */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the discussion thread was started */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the discussion thread */,
  "last_post_date" TEXT /* Date of the last post in the discussion thread */,
  "post_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts in the discussion thread */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_discussions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion thread the post is in */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* ID of the post this post is replying to */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the post has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the post has received */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Whether the post is sticky (pinned to the top of the thread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_posts_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES project_discussions ("discussion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the event is associated with */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the event */,
  "registration_link" TEXT /* Link for event registration */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda for the event */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees the event can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_events_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the registration is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user registering for the event */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered for the event */,
  "confirmation_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES project_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, student, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is for */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the report */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is sent to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., project update, event reminder) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the version is associated with */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource or document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the version was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for this version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES project_resources ("resource_id")
)
